name: Joanne Woodward Zucchini Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, ground cinnamon, and salt.
2. In another bowl, beat the eggs until foamy. Gradually add sugar, oil, and vanilla to the egg mixture.
3. Sift the dry ingredients over the wet ingredients a little at a time, stirring constantly to avoid lumps.
4. Add the grated zucchini and stir until well combined. The mixture will be thick and slightly gummy.
5. Grease two 8x4x2 inch loaf pans and pour in the batter.
6. Bake for 50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow to cool before serving. This bread can also be frozen for later use.
